children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Validate and parse the command string to determine the operation type.
children.behavior: Check that command is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'. If invalid, return error.

acceptance_criteria.description: Valid command returns parsed_command and None error
Invalid command returns None parsed_command and error message

children.stop_reason: Pure validation function with no side effects

children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'place' command: validate items, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order, send notification.
children.behavior: Sequentially call child functions for each step; if any fails, rollback previous steps.

data_operations.description: Read product stock, decrement available, increment reserved

constraints.description: All items must exist in inventory with sufficient stock
Payment must be successfully processed before order creation

acceptance_criteria.description: Inventory reserved_count incremented for each item
On failure, all changes are rolled back (no partial state)

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'cancel' command: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update status.
children.behavior: Sequentially call child functions; rollback on failure.

global_vars.description: Read order status, update status to 'cancelled'
Read payment record, update status to 'refunded'

data_operations.description: Read order details, update status to cancelled
Read reserved items, decrement reserved, increment available
Read payment record, update status to refunded

constraints.description: Order must exist and not be in 'shipped' or 'cancelled' status
Payment must exist and be refundable

acceptance_criteria.description: Inventory stock restored (reserved decremented, available incremented)
On failure, no changes are persisted

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'track' command: retrieve order status and estimated delivery time.
children.behavior: Query orders database for order_id, return status and delivery estimate.

global_vars.description: Read order status and delivery info

constraints.description: Order must exist in the database

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns order status and estimated delivery time
Returns error if order_id not found

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: orders (read_write) covered by CancelOrder (read_write) and TrackOrder (read) and PlaceOrder (write); inventory (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (read_write) and CancelOrder (read_write); payments (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (write) and CancelOrder (read_write). ParseCommand requires no data stores. All parent operations are fully distributed across children.
